name: Duff"s Golf Lounge
address: 224 N Yenlo St suite 3, Wasilla, AK 99654
about: Duff's Golf Lounge offers an indoor golf experience with state-of-the-art simulators in Wasilla, Alaska. The facility features three premium simulators equipped with advanced tracking technology for accurate ball flight and swing analysis, allowing golfers to play on famous courses year-round. Available for booking at $50 per bay per hour, the venue emphasizes flexible hours and a welcoming atmosphere suitable for both casual players and serious golfers looking to practice or compete in leagues.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round golf access regardless of Alaska's harsh weather
Advanced tracking technology for accurate swing and ball flight analysis
Flexible scheduling options including make-up rounds
Weekly free coaching clinics hosted by local golf pros
Competitive leagues and special events for all skill levels

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulators with advanced tracking systems for accurate ball flight and swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify club rental availability, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a curated menu with local brews and hearty fare, but doesn't mention if outside food and drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the duration for 18 holes, but simulator sessions can be booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is this place kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Duff's Golf Lounge offers Youth & Family Night events designed for junior golfers (ages 10-17) and family teams, making it kid-friendly.
